title: ilysanthes reptans
intro: Ilysanthes reptans, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the Primulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Ilysanthes reptans include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to reduce stress and alleviate menstrual cramps. Ilysanthes reptans is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
